---
name: Bug report
about: Report a bug or unexpected behaviour
title: ''
labels: bug
assignees: mitchib1440

---

**Describe the bug**
A clear and concise description of what the bug is. This might be a functionality issue, UI glitch, or even just a typo.

**SelfTest Diagnostic Code (If applicable)**
If SpeakThat is failing to read notifications, please run the SelfTest (the stethoscope icon on the Main Screen) and paste the 4-digit result code here:
- Code: [e.g., 0414]

**To Reproduce**
Explain how you got the bug to happen, and how I can recreate the issue on my end.


**Expected behavior**
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

**Device & App Information (please complete the following):**
 - Device Model: [e.g., Fairphone 6]
 - Android Version: [e.g., Android 16]
 - SpeakThat! Version: [e.g., SpeakThat! v1.7.4]
 - Installation Source: [e.g., GitHub, Play Store, F-Droid]
 - Text-to-Speech Engine: [e.g., Google TTS, Samsung TTS]

**Screenshots or Screen Recordings**
If applicable, add screenshots or a screen recording to help explain your problem. (Please clearly redact any personal information in your notifications!)

**Logs (Highly Recommended)**
If the app is crashing or behaving unpredictably, please go to **Development Settings**, export your Event Log or Crash Log, and attach it here. 

**Is SpeakThat working otherwise?**
Has this issue prevented SpeakThat from working entirely, or is it only broken in a specific situation?

**Additional context**
Add any other context about the problem here (e.g., "This only started happening after the latest Android system update").
